title: SkinRecruit NloobSkinPack
description: This is a simple Texture Pack that changes the NPC Recruit mobs.
body:
Welcome to a specialized resource pack designed to breathe new life into your army. This pack focuses specifically on the Recruit Mod, providing a visual overhaul to the NPC Recruits you know and love.

If you have felt that the standard look of the recruits doesn't quite fit your style, or if you are looking for a more distinct appearance for your soldiers, this pack is exactly what you need.

What This Pack Changes

This resource pack targets a specific variant of the mobs to ensure compatibility and style:

The Retro Variant: The main focus of this texture pack is the "Retro" variant of the recruit. It replaces the default texture with a custom-designed look.

Originals Stay Intact: Please note that this pack does not alter the standard/original version of the recruits. It is purely designed to enhance the Retro variant, allowing for a diverse mix of soldier appearances in your world.

Requirements & Dependencies

To use this resource pack, you must have the Recruit Mod installed.

This is not a standalone mod.

It is a visual add-on (Resource Pack).

Without the base mod, the textures will have no model to apply to, and the pack will not function.

How to Install

Download the .zip file.

Do not extract it. Move the file into your Minecraft resourcepacks folder.

Launch the game and go to Options > Resource Packs.

Move this pack to the right side (Selected) and ensure it is above any other conflicting resource packs.

Support

If you encounter any issues with textures not showing up, please double-check that you have the correct version of the Recruit Mod installed and that you are spawning the Retro variant of the mob.
